creator: freebsd@chriswells.io
text:
Created attachment 155071
Patch that resolves the issue.

With glib 2.42 installed, the current mysql-workbench-gpl52 package displays blank output and result sets.  The issue was reported to the MySQL project and fixed in version 6.2.4:

http://bugs.mysql.com/bug.php?id=74147

There is a diff patch attached to their ticket that resolves the issue in our current mysql-workbench-gpl52 port:

http://bugs.mysql.com/file.php?id=21874&bug_id=74147

I'm attaching the same diff to this ticket for convenience.

I would expect this issue to exist on all hardware, but I selected amd64 because that's all I've personally verified it on.
